title: MCPJungle
author: MCPJungle Community
description: Self-hosted MCP Gateway - Centralize and manage all your MCP servers from a single endpoint. Register/deregister MCP servers on the fly.
tagline: One gateway, all your MCP servers
postInstallMessage:
MCPJungle is ready.

## Admin Dashboard

Manage your MCP servers at: `https://<your-domain>/admin`

Protected by Cloudron SSO - only Cloudron users can access it.

## MCP Gateway

Connect AI clients to: `https://<your-domain>/mcp`

Create API keys from the dashboard (API Keys tab).

## Connect Claude Code

Add to `.mcp.json`:
```
{"mcpServers":{"mcpjungle":{"type":"streamable-http","url":"https://<your-domain>/mcp","headers":{"Authorization":"Bearer YOUR_API_KEY"}}}}
```

Or with lazy-mcp (~90% token reduction):
```
npx lazy-mcp@latest --config servers.json
```

## Bridge Port

Servers with a bridge port get: `https://<your-domain>/bridge/<name>/`

## Useful Commands

```
mcpjungle-admin doctor
mcpjungle-admin list-managed
mcpjungle-admin reconcile
```

Full docs: https://github.com/jbjardine/mcpjungle-cloudron
